title: PyPI project search
commands: cliany-site explore "https://pypi.org" "search Python packages for cliany-site and list project names" --json

validation.offline: candidate entry and example output validate without release adapter package assets
validation.online: read-only PyPI search returns project cards for the query

promotion.adapter_package: Generate and publish pypi.org-<version>.cliany-adapter.tar.gz in a future release.
promotion.metadata_validation: Run python scripts/validate_cases.py --packages-dir ~/.cliany-site/packages --strict once the package exists.
promotion.online_smoke: Run cliany-site pypi.org search-projects --query cliany-site --limit 5 --json against PyPI and confirm non-empty project rows.

adapter_package.next_action: Generate pypi.org-<version>.cliany-adapter.tar.gz with cliany-site explore and market publish, then attach the package path or release asset name.

metadata_validation.next_action: After the package exists, run python scripts/validate_cases.py --packages-dir ~/.cliany-site/packages --strict and paste the result.

online_smoke.next_action: Run cliany-site pypi.org search-projects --query cliany-site --limit 5 --json and attach a JSON envelope summary with data.quality.ok=true and row_count>0.
